name: Existing Claim - Happy Path (Warm Transfer)
description: Caller with a claim number is warm-transferred to the Warranty queue.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I'm calling to check the status of my warranty claim. My claim number is GB-2025-78421.
expectedOutcome: Agent identifies existing-claim path, notes/confirms the claim number, explains a specialist will pull up the claim, and warm-transfers (SIP REFER) to the Cisco UCCE Warranty Queue with a context packet so the caller won't repeat themselves. The IVR does NOT look up status itself.
